vita: As a representative for the Zhareen species, I've dedicated my life to bridging gaps between warring factions across star systems. My journey began on Zhareen homeworld where disputes often led to bloodshed.
portrait_prompt: A dignified Galactarch with an ethereal sheen of silver in their skin, standing at the heart of a bustling interstellar trade nexus; hands outstretched as if ready for negotin', eyes reflecting wisdom and empathy.
